home.meta.title.value: Susana Stethers Photography | Family & Newborn Photographer in Roswell, GA
home.meta.title.label: Page title (shows in Google)

home.meta.description.value: Light, airy family, newborn, maternity, milestone and couples photography in Roswell, Georgia. Relaxed, natural sessions that feel true to your family.
home.meta.description.label: Google description (aim for 150–160 characters)

home.page.capture-the-moments-you-ll-nev.value: Capture the moments you’ll never want to forget
home.page.capture-the-moments-you-ll-nev.label: Main heading

home.from-past-clients.susana-made-our-w.value: Susana made our whole session feel like play. Our toddler warmed up in minutes, and the photos are the most “us” we’ve ever looked.
home.from-past-clients.susana-made-our-w.label: Testimonial quote

home.from-past-clients.she-came-to-our-h.value: She came to our home for our newborn session and there was zero pressure — plenty of time for feeding and cuddles. The gallery made me cry.
home.from-past-clients.she-came-to-our-h.label: Testimonial quote 2

home.from-past-clients.gentle-direction-.value: Gentle direction, beautiful light, and a gallery two weeks later. The easiest photo experience we’ve ever had.
home.from-past-clients.gentle-direction-.label: Testimonial quote 3

home.calm-comfortable-stress-free.from-p.value: From planning your session to delivering your final gallery, I’ll guide you every step of the way. Sessions are designed to be calm, comfortable, and stress-free — especially for young families and first-time parents.
home.calm-comfortable-stress-free.from-p.label: Paragraph

home.calm-comfortable-stress-free.with-g.value: With gentle direction and a focus on natural moments, you can relax and enjoy time together while I document the connection, emotion, and details you’ll want to remember for years to come.
home.calm-comfortable-stress-free.with-g.label: Paragraph 2

home.hi-i-m-susana.i-m-a-roswell-ga-phot.value: I’m a Roswell, GA photographer specializing in family, newborn, maternity, milestone, and couples photography. My approach is relaxed and natural, focusing on genuine connection and creating light, airy images that feel timeless and true to your family.
home.hi-i-m-susana.i-m-a-roswell-ga-phot.label: Paragraph

home.hi-i-m-susana.whether-you-re-welcom.value: Whether you’re welcoming a new baby, celebrating a milestone, or simply wanting to remember this season as it is, I’m here to document your story in a way that feels effortless and meaningful.
home.hi-i-m-susana.whether-you-re-welcom.label: Paragraph 2

about.meta.title.value: About Susana | Roswell, GA Family & Newborn Photographer
about.meta.title.label: Page title (shows in Google)

about.meta.description.value: Meet Susana Stethers — a Roswell, Georgia family photographer creating relaxed, kid-friendly sessions and light, airy images that feel natural and timeless.
about.meta.description.label: Google description (aim for 150–160 characters)

about.page.hi-i-m-susana-the-photographe.value: Hi, I’m Susana — the photographer behind the camera.
about.page.hi-i-m-susana-the-photographe.label: Main heading

about.page.i-m-a-roswell-ga-family-photo.value: I’m a Roswell, GA family photographer specializing in newborn, family, maternity, milestone, and couples photography. I’m drawn to the beauty in everyday moments — soft light, genuine connection, and the small details that make each season of life meaningful.
about.page.i-m-a-roswell-ga-family-photo.label: Paragraph

about.page.as-a-mom-myself-i-understand-.value: As a mom myself, I understand how fleeting these moments are and how quickly life changes. That perspective shapes the way I approach every session. My goal is to create a relaxed, comfortable experience where your family can slow down, be present, and simply enjoy time together.
about.page.as-a-mom-myself-i-understand-.label: Paragraph 2

about.page.my-sessions-are-kid-friendly-.value: My sessions are kid-friendly and guided in a natural way, making space for both quiet moments and playful energy. I love working with children of all personalities — from shy little ones who need time to warm up to high-energy kids who want to run, explore, and be themselves. I’ll happily get on the floor, follow their lead, and gently guide you so nothing ever feels awkward or forced.
about.page.my-sessions-are-kid-friendly-.label: Paragraph 3

about.page.outside-of-photography-i-m-in.value: Outside of photography, I’m inspired by flowers, beautiful spaces, travel, and event planning — anything that celebrates creativity and thoughtful details. That love for beauty and intention carries into my work, where I focus on creating light, airy images that feel natural, warm, and timeless.
about.page.outside-of-photography-i-m-in.label: Paragraph 4

about.page.my-goal-is-to-preserve-your-f.value: My goal is to preserve your family’s memories in a way that feels honest and enduring — images you’ll return to years from now and remember exactly how this season of life felt.
about.page.my-goal-is-to-preserve-your-f.label: Paragraph 5

experience.meta.description.value: What to expect from a session with Susana Stethers — calm, kid-friendly photography in Roswell, GA, from planning and outfits to your final gallery in two weeks.
experience.meta.description.label: Google description (aim for 150–160 characters)

experience.page.easy-comfortable-enjoyab.value: Easy, comfortable & enjoyable — especially for little ones
experience.page.easy-comfortable-enjoyab.label: Main heading

experience.frequently-asked-questions.wh.label: Sub-heading
Sub-heading 2
Sub-heading 3
Sub-heading 4

experience.frequently-asked-questions.ho.label: Sub-heading 5

experience.page.once-you-book-i-ll-guide.value: Once you book, I’ll guide you through simple preparation so you feel ready and relaxed. This includes outfit suggestions, location guidance, and help choosing the best timing for your session.
experience.page.once-you-book-i-ll-guide.label: Paragraph

experience.page.sessions-are-calm-playfu.value: Sessions are calm, playful, and natural. I’ll offer gentle direction while allowing space for authentic moments to unfold. You’ll never be left wondering what to do, and there’s no pressure for perfection — just connection.
experience.page.sessions-are-calm-playfu.label: Paragraph 2

experience.page.you-ll-receive-a-thought.value: You’ll receive a thoughtfully curated online gallery filled with images that reflect your family just as they are in this season — honest, warm, and timeless photographs you’ll cherish for years to come.
experience.page.you-ll-receive-a-thought.label: Paragraph 3

experience.frequently-asked-questions.th.value: That’s completely normal — and welcome! I’ll get on their level, follow their lead, and get silly when needed. The most meaningful images come from real connection, not practiced smiles.
experience.frequently-asked-questions.th.label: FAQ answer

experience.frequently-asked-questions.se.value: Sessions can take place outdoors around Roswell and the surrounding areas, in the comfort of your home, or in a studio. Studio sessions are available for an additional rental fee, and I’ll help you choose the setting that best fits your vision.
experience.frequently-asked-questions.se.label: FAQ answer 2

experience.frequently-asked-questions.af.value: After booking, you’ll receive style guidance with outfit suggestions that photograph beautifully in soft, natural light. Comfort always comes first, especially for little ones.
experience.frequently-asked-questions.af.label: FAQ answer 3

experience.frequently-asked-questions.re.value: Reach out during pregnancy whenever you feel ready so we can reserve a flexible window around your due date. Lifestyle newborn sessions are often photographed during the first few weeks, but there is no strict age cutoff — we’ll choose timing that feels comfortable for your family.
experience.frequently-asked-questions.re.label: FAQ answer 4

experience.frequently-asked-questions.yo.value: Your thoughtfully curated online gallery is delivered within two weeks of your session.
experience.frequently-asked-questions.yo.label: FAQ answer 5

experience.page.my-sessions-are-designed.value: My sessions are designed to feel easy, comfortable, and enjoyable — especially for little ones. From the very beginning, my goal is to create a relaxed experience where your family feels at ease and free to be yourselves.
experience.page.my-sessions-are-designed.label: Paragraph 4

experience.page.i-take-the-time-to-conne.value: I take the time to connect with your children, meet them where they are, and help them feel safe and confident in front of the camera. Whether your child is shy and needs a few minutes to warm up or full of energy and ready to explore, I embrace it all.
experience.page.i-take-the-time-to-conne.label: Paragraph 5

experience.page.i-ll-get-on-their-level-.value: I’ll get on their level, follow their lead, and get silly when needed — while gently guiding you so nothing ever feels awkward or forced. You don’t need perfectly behaved kids or practiced smiles. The most meaningful images come from real connection, and that starts with everyone feeling comfortable.
experience.page.i-ll-get-on-their-level-.label: Paragraph 6

investment.a-few-things-to-know.all-edit.value: All edited images are included with every session — there are no image packages or additional download fees.
investment.a-few-things-to-know.all-edit.label: Bullet point

investment.a-few-things-to-know.a-signed.value: A signed contract and retainer are required to reserve your date.
investment.a-few-things-to-know.a-signed.label: Bullet point 2

investment.a-few-things-to-know.sessions.value: Sessions are scheduled during the best natural light for the most beautiful results.
investment.a-few-things-to-know.sessions.label: Bullet point 3

investment.a-few-things-to-know.outdoor-.value: Outdoor, in-home, and studio options are available. Studio rental requires an additional fee.
investment.a-few-things-to-know.outdoor-.label: Bullet point 4

investment.a-few-things-to-know.extended.value: Extended family sessions are available upon request.
investment.a-few-things-to-know.extended.label: Bullet point 5

investment.seasonal-mini-sessions.every-.value: Every session includes style guidance and location recommendations.
investment.seasonal-mini-sessions.every-.label: Small print
